creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
The host serving the source of the port ports-mgmt/psearch disappeared from the Internet. This PR intends to rescue this port from nirwana.

If you have the source archive in your distfiles cache please make it available to a friendly hosting server.

Psearch is a very useful utility for searching FreeBSD ports offline even without having the whole ports-tree installed. All it needs is a INDEX file in /usr/ports. That makes this little tool so unique and useful for fast searching the FreeBSD ports. I think it is worth to rescue this port. 

Thank you for help.
